notes: GAP-026 conservative report-only defaults. Limits are negative USD values; if today's per-strategy realized PnL <= the configured limit, new entry signals are blocked when CHAD_PER_STRATEGY_LOSS_LIMIT_ENFORCE=1. Default mode is report_only — no suppression unless the env flag is set. Exits, reductions, hedges, and protective/liquidation actions are NEVER suppressed. Daily windows are evaluated against the active epoch start (runtime/epoch_state.json) so contaminated Epoch 1 PnL cannot trigger Epoch 2 suppression.
